'''鈭歵h-ch-g''' ('''thachaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:publicise|publicise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publicise|publicise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ch-g
|-
! Lemma
| thachaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachagithi|thachagithi]] || [[word:thachagiji|thachagiji]] || [[word:thachagishi|thachagishi]] || [[word:thachagi|thachagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachaguthuth|thachaguthuth]] || [[word:thachagujuj|thachagujuj]] || [[word:thachagushush|thachagushush]] || [[word:thachag|thachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachaguthu|thachaguthu]] || [[word:thachaguju|thachaguju]] || [[word:thachagushu|thachagushu]] || [[word:thachagu|thachagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachagufuth|thachagufuth]] || [[word:thachagufuj|thachagufuj]] || [[word:thachagufush|thachagufush]] || [[word:thachaguf|thachaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachagethe|thachagethe]] || [[word:thachageje|thachageje]] || [[word:thachageshe|thachageshe]] || [[word:thachage|thachage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachagothoth|thachagothoth]] || [[word:thachagojoj|thachagojoj]] || [[word:thachagoshosh|thachagoshosh]] || [[word:thachag|thachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachagotho|thachagotho]] || [[word:thachagojo|thachagojo]] || [[word:thachagosho|thachagosho]] || [[word:thachago|thachago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachagofoth|thachagofoth]] || [[word:thachagofoj|thachagofoj]] || [[word:thachagofosh|thachagofosh]] || [[word:thachagof|thachagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachag忙th忙|thachag忙th忙]] || [[word:thachag忙j忙|thachag忙j忙]] || [[word:thachag忙sh忙|thachag忙sh忙]] || [[word:thachag忙|thachag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachagathath|thachagathath]] || [[word:thachagajaj|thachagajaj]] || [[word:thachagashash|thachagashash]] || [[word:thachag|thachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachagatha|thachagatha]] || [[word:thachagaja|thachagaja]] || [[word:thachagasha|thachagasha]] || [[word:thachaga|thachaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachagafath|thachagafath]] || [[word:thachagafaj|thachagafaj]] || [[word:thachagafash|thachagafash]] || [[word:thachagaf|thachagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thachagasha|thachagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothachagasha|gothachagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithachagasha|gokithachagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thachagn眉sha|thachagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothachagnkn眉sha|gothachagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithachagn眉sha|gokithachagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thachagsh毛sha|thachagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothachagnksh毛sha|gothachagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithachagsh毛sha|gokithachagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachagrosha|thachagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachagnkrosha|gothachagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachagrosha|gokithachagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thachagmusha|thachagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachagnkmusha|gothachagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachagmusha|gokithachagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thachagsherasha|thachagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothachagnksherasha|gothachagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithachagsherasha|gokithachagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thachagngasha|thachagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothachagnkngasha|gothachagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithachagngasha|gokithachagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thachagyasha|thachagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothachagnkyasha|gothachagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithachagyasha|gokithachagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thachagyamasha|thachagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothachagnkyamasha|gothachagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithachagyamasha|gokithachagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachagn眉sh毛sha|thachagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachagnkn眉sh毛sha|gothachagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachagn眉sh毛sha|gokithachagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachagn眉rosha|thachagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachagnkn眉rosha|gothachagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachagn眉rosha|gokithachagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachagn眉musha|thachagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachagnkn眉musha|gothachagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachagn眉musha|gokithachagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachagsh毛n眉sha|thachagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachagnksh毛n眉sha|gothachagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachagsh毛n眉sha|gokithachagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachagsh毛rosha|thachagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachagnksh毛rosha|gothachagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachagsh毛rosha|gokithachagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachagsh毛musha|thachagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachagnksh毛musha|gothachagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachagsh毛musha|gokithachagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachagron眉sha|thachagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachagnkron眉sha|gothachagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachagron眉sha|gokithachagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachagrosh毛sha|thachagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachagnkrosh毛sha|gothachagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachagrosh毛sha|gokithachagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachagromusha|thachagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachagnkromusha|gothachagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachagromusha|gokithachagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thachagmun眉sha|thachagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothachagnkmun眉sha|gothachagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithachagmun眉sha|gokithachagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thachagmush毛sha|thachagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothachagnkmush毛sha|gothachagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithachagmush毛sha|gokithachagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thachagmurosha|thachagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothachagnkmurosha|gothachagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithachagmurosha|gokithachagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thachag|thachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙ch忙g|th忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothachag|hothachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙ch忙g|hoth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothachag|hohothachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙ch忙g|hohoth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thachag|n眉thachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙ch忙g|n眉th忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thachag|n眉n眉thachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙ch忙g|n眉n眉th忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thachag|n茂thachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙ch忙g|n茂th忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thachag|n茂n茂thachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙ch忙g|n茂n茂th忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthachag|luthachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙ch忙g|luth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthachag|luluthachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙ch忙g|luluth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithachag|lithachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙ch忙g|lith忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithachag|lilithachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙ch忙g|lilith忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothachag|kothachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙ch忙g|koth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothachag|kokothachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙ch忙g|kokoth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethachag|kethachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙ch忙g|keth忙ch忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethachag|kekethachag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙ch忙g|keketh忙ch忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
